titles.title: My Home Is On the Rock

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise God I live in Beulah land, My house will the storms with stand It is not built on sinking sand, My home is on the Rock.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My home is on the Rock The everlasting love I do not fear when the storms are near My home Is on the Rock.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When come life’s trials thick and fast, When clouds are o’er my pathway; It is not built on sinking sand, My home is on the Rock.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When troubles come that would appall, When other buildings round me fail; It is not built on sinking sand, My home is on the Rock.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when my time has come to go, I’ll have a mansion in the sky; It is not built on sinking sand, My home is on the Rock.
